/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/print_mupdf_version.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/print_mupdf_version.dir/print_mupdf_version.cpp.o -o print_mupdf_version   -L/home/bat/src/jfbview/vendor/mupdf/build/release  -Wl,-rpath,/home/bat/src/jfbview/vendor/mupdf/build/release -lmupdf -lmupdf-third /usr/lib/libjpeg.so /usr/lib/libharfbuzz.so /usr/lib/libfreetype.so /usr/lib/libz.so /usr/lib/libopenjp2.so
